name: Spacetop — Multimodal Naturalistic & Task fMRI
description: A deep multimodal fMRI dataset of 101 participants with ~6 hours of scanning each (>600 iso-hours of data), combining 6 multifaceted functional tasks spanning cognitive, affective, social, and somatic/interoceptive domains with 2 hours of naturalistic movie viewing, T1 structural and multi-shell diffusion imaging, and autonomic physiological recordings. Its scale and breadth make it well-suited for probing social and affective processes in naturalistic and task contexts.
citation: Wager TD, et al. (2025). Spacetop: A multimodal fMRI dataset unifying naturalistic processes with a rich array of experimental tasks. Scientific Data, 12, 1465.
